title: gonystylus borneensis
intro: Gonystylus borneensis is a species of tree in the family Thymelaeaceae, native to the tropical forests of Borneo. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gonystylus borneensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and boosting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the tree are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
